programs.title: Jimmy Doherty's New Zealand Escape
programs.desc: Jimmy takes a trip to the tropical north to visit New Zealand.His culinary discoveries will not be the only attraction of the program.There will also be a visit to the winery and a show of seasonal specialties.

programs.title: Treasures Decoded
programs.desc: The history of the Sphinx, the Shroud of Turin, the map of El Dorado, and a controversial piece of papyrus.

programs.title: Life Below Zero
programs.desc: Daily struggles of daredevils from various regions of Alaska.The inhabitants of the four houses face further hardships of life in a frosty climate and fight to survive a long and dangerous winter.

programs.title: Planet Earth 2
programs.desc: A fascinating natural spectacle.The creators of the program show the wealth of fauna and flora that inhabit the world.They visit all continents, where they observe commonly known and very rare species of animals and plants.Using the development of technology, they show life on Earth from a completely new perspective.They allow you to look at the world through the eyes of the creatures that inhabit it.Cameras placed very close record the normally elusive behavior of wild creatures.High-quality photos allow viewers to be in the very center of events - births, hunts or fights for leadership in the herd.All this is accompanied by commentary by David Attenborough, the famous naturalist, traveler and journalist.The series was divided into six parts.The first one reveals the richness of life on islands - from volcanic ones, through equatorial paradises, to Antarctica.The second episode focuses on mountains, the third - jungles, the fourth about deserts, and the fifth about steppes and savannas.The last one will present the life of animals in cities.

programs.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programs.desc: Presenter, writer and adventurer Ben Fogle travels to different parts of the world to meet people who have decided to leave the comfort of Western civilization and start a new life.
